lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship — used to size the cabin suite, shield and drives.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Imperial Clipper ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout and passenger-cabin module sizes underpinning the loadout and berth count.

sources.label: Inara — Imperial Clipper
sources.what: Ship reference page: hull stats, passenger-cabin capacity, module slot layout, rank requirement.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Imperial Clipper ship article: role profile, Gutamaya manufacture, rank requirement backing the passenger write-up.
